sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98578" key="sumparolisqa/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμπαρ-ολισθάνω</orth>, <sense id="n98578.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slip past together with</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῖς ὑγροῖς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.699a</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
